title: Anchorpoint
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''anchorpoint''' was a point in a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] such as the [[Marasa Nebula/Legends|Marasa Nebula]] which could be used to chart safe [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]]. The [[Marasan]]s, using [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computers]] attached directly to their brains as [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] implants, were able to find these anchorpoints and use them to chart routes from their home planet of [[Marasai]] to the twelve other systems within the Marasa Nebula.<ref name="GG12">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref>
